label: Run number
description: Sequential run number assigned by DSSAT

label: Weather year
description: Year for weather data (for forecast ensembles)

label: Latitude (deg)
description: Site latitude in degrees (renamed from LATI)

label: Biomass kg/ha
description: Biomass at maturity (total crop minus roots) (kg[dm]/ha

label: Fresh harvest
description: Harvest product fresh wt at maturity (kg/ha)

label: Fr. byproduct
description: By-product removed during harvest fresh wt (kg/ha)

label: Net N mineraliz
description_kr: 시즌 누적 순 N 무기화량 (kg N/ha)

label: Tot Org N kg/ha
description: Total Organic N at maturity, soil and surface (kg/ha)
description_kr: 성숙기 총 유기 N (토양+표면, kg N/ha)

label: Tot Org P kg/ha
description: Total Organic P at maturity, soil and surface (kg/ha)
description_kr: 성숙기 총 유기 P (토양+표면, kg P/ha)

label: Tot Org C kg/ha
description: Total Organic C at maturity, soil and surface (kg/ha)
description_kr: 성숙기 총 유기 C (토양+표면, kg C/ha)

label: DM-N fert Prod
description_kr: N 비료당 건물생산성 (kg DM/kg N 시비)

label: DM-N upt Prod
description_kr: N 흡수당 건물생산성 (kg DM/kg N 흡수)

label: Yd-N fert Prod
description_kr: N 비료당 수확량 생산성 (kg yield/kg N 시비)

label: Yd-N upt Prod
description_kr: N 흡수당 수확량 생산성 (kg yield/kg N 흡수)

label: Days to harvest
description: Number of days from planting to harvest (d)

label: Maximum temp oC
description: Avg maximum air temperature, planting to harvest (oC)

label: Minimum temp oC
description: Avg minimum air temperature, planting to harvest (oC)

label: Avg CO2 (ppm)
description: Average atmospheric CO2 (ppm), planting to harvest

label: Precip, plant
description: Total season precipitation (mm), planting to harvest

label: ES plant seas
description: Total soil evaporation, planting to harvest (mm)

label: Sim Status
description_kr: 시즌 종료 시 작물 상태 코드 (성숙/실패 등)
